description: Whether hooks can make or influence permission decisions determining whether a tool is available for invocation. Minimum qualification: supported when the provider allows hooks to return permission decisions of any kind (grant, deny, or ask). Boundary: permission_control governs whether a tool is available; see decision_control for invocation-flow control.

amp.mechanism: amp.permissions ordered first-match-wins rule list returns one of allow / reject / ask / delegate for every tool invocation before execution; default fallback is ask on the main thread and reject in sub-agents

claude-code.mechanism: hook_permission_update_entries: PermissionRequest hooks return updatedPermissions with addRules/replaceRules/removeRules/setMode entries

cline.mechanism: Cline hooks can cancel tool invocations (decision_control) but cannot grant/deny tool availability

codex.mechanism: hook_permission_decision: Codex hooks can return permission decisions that grant or deny tool availability

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI hooks can deny tool invocations (decision_control) but do not govern tool availability

crush.mechanism: Hooks run before permission checks. Exit code 2 blocks the tool call entirely, taking effect before the built-in permission gate.

cursor.mechanism: Cursor hooks control allow/block via exit codes but do not govern tool availability through permission rule updates.

factory-droid.mechanism: PreToolUse hooks return allow, deny, or ask in the JSON decision field to bypass, block, or escalate tool permission decisions

gemini-cli.mechanism: Gemini CLI hooks control invocation flow via exit codes but do not govern tool availability

kiro.mechanism: Kiro hooks do not participate in permission decisions

pi.mechanism: Pi extensions cannot make availability decisions for tools; tool_call block controls invocation flow but does not remove a tool from the available set; setActiveTools() is available but is not a hook return mechanism

windsurf.mechanism: Windsurf hooks do not participate in permission decisions
